notes: Pure linear-algebra file with no elliptic-curve imports; contains the abstract matrix and module-level core of Silverman III.8.6 (det φ = deg φ via symplectic scaling). Two parallel routes are offered: the adjoint+norm+trace route (det_eq_of_symplectic_adjoint, frob_det_data_of_adjoint_norm_trace) and the additivity-free per-isogeny scaling route (det_eq_of_symplectic_scaling, frob_det_data_of_scaling, det_eq_of_alternating_scaling, frob_det_data_of_pairing_form); the latter is the load-bearing interface consumed by DetDeg and Assembly. No sorries, no heartbeat overrides; all proofs are short.
